claims.statement: On setup, the master password is hashed with PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256.
claims.source_quote:
your master password is hashed with 
 (random salt, 310 000 iterations) and stored

claims.statement: On setup, the password hash uses a random salt.
On setup, the password hash uses 310000 iterations.
The same password is used to derive the AES key.
claims.source_quote: The same password is used to derive the AES key.

claims.statement: On login, the entered password is re-derived and compared against the stored hash.
claims.source_quote: the entered password is re-derived and compared against the stored hash

claims.statement: A wrong password means no access.
On import, the file is read into memory.
claims.source_quote: the file is read into memory

claims.statement: On import, the file is encrypted with AES-256-GCM using a random IV.
On import, the encrypted file is written to ~/.ciphervault/vault/.
claims.source_quote:
written to 
. Only the ciphertext ever touches disk.

claims.statement: Only ciphertext ever touches disk during import.
claims.source_quote: Only the ciphertext ever touches disk.

claims.statement: On export, the encrypted blob is decrypted in memory.
claims.source_quote: the encrypted blob is decrypted in memory

claims.statement: On export, the decrypted file is written to the chosen destination.

entities.name: User
entities.description: The human interacting with the system.

entities.name: master password
entities.description: Primary password used for setup and access.

entities.name: PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256
entities.description: Password hashing and key derivation algorithm.

entities.name: file
entities.description: A file being imported into the vault.

entities.name: AES-256-GCM
entities.description: Authenticated encryption algorithm used for file encryption.

entities.name: ~/.ciphervault/vault/
entities.description: Directory where encrypted vault blobs are stored.

entities.name: encrypted blob
entities.description: Encrypted file data stored in the vault.

relations.description: The master password is hashed with PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256.
The AES key is derived from the same password.
Imported files are encrypted with AES-256-GCM.
Encrypted imported files are written to the vault directory.
